title: Snyk Code Scan Remediation for Salesforce Security Audit
description: Review and remediate findings from a Snyk code scan (DataToolsPro_DTP_Bootstrap_V2_Baseline) to prepare for a Salesforce security audit resubmission. The scan results need to be reviewed, false positives identified, and genuine issues resolved before resubmitting for the audit.
acceptance_criteria: All Snyk scan findings are reviewed and categorized as genuine or false positive
Application passes Snyk scan without critical or high findings
Ready for Salesforce security audit resubmission
middleware_changes: Code remediation based on Snyk scan findings. SQL injection false positives confirmed safe due to Eloquent/Query Builder prepared statements.
implementation_notes: Snyk scan baseline report generated. Some SQL injection findings are false positives — the code uses Eloquent/Query Builder with prepared statements. Encrypted data is read from the database, not from forms, so some data exposure findings are also false positives.
